item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Red Mage's Journey IV
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned red mage─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level red mage to 90 and complete all job quests and magical ranged DPS role quests up through “Ever March Heavensward.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
